verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Hey ey ey ey Hey ey ey ey

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Everybody, lift your hands, Everybody, sing his praises, with every voice shout, and rejoice to the mighty, God the Anointed one.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He is mighty and greatly to be praised, He is holy let us worship and adore, He is worthy we will magnify His name, He is worthy to be worshipped and praised.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are mighty, You are holy, You are worthy to be praised.
